title: navarretia leucocephala subsp. diffusa
intro: Navarretia leucocephala subsp. diffusa, also known as spreading leucocephala, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the phlox family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and showing potential in treating certain types of cancer. Navarretia leucocephala subsp. diffusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional remedies, such as salves and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties.
